title: psoralidium collinum
intro: Psoralidium collinum, also known as scurfpea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psoralidium collinum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Psoralidium collinum can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
